objective: Fix media not rendering in chat UI - proxy through CRM backend

Fix: (A) getMediaUrl() now rewrites all media URLs to CRM backend public proxy /media/wa-proxy?url=encoded_url (B) Backend proxy applies resolveDockerUrl() so container can reach WA API via host.docker.internal (C) SSRF check updated to compare resolved origins for Docker compatibility

objective: Fix inflated unread counts + contact name cleanup
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: sync.service.ts overwrote CRM unread_count with WA API rc.unread_count on every sync causing massive inflation (19256 unread but only 114 messages). Fix: (A) Removed unread_count overwrite from both sync locations - CRM tracks unread via webhook increment+markAsRead reset (B) Reset all conversation unread_count to 0 in DB (C) Fixed contact name '.' for own number 6283803272911 to 'Adi Syahadi (Saya)'

objective: Fix media blocked by Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: helmet() sets Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin on all responses. Browser blocks img/video/audio from loading cross-origin (localhost:5000 served to page at localhost:3002) with ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE.NotSameOrigin. Fix: override CORP header to cross-origin on both proxy and publicProxy media endpoints

objective: Fix contact name corruption - push_name from OUTGOING overwrites contact name
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: webhook _processMessageForInstance() used push_name/sender_name/notify for contact name on ALL messages including OUTGOING. For OUTGOING messages push_name = OWN WA profile name (Adi Syahadi) not the contact's name. This caused 4 different contacts to all be named 'Adi Syahadi'. Fix: (A) Only use push_name/sender_name/notify for contact name on INCOMING messages. For OUTGOING only use contact_name (WA address book). (B) Reset 4 corrupted contacts back to phone_number so they get correct name on next incoming message

objective: Handle relative media_url from WA API PATCH-063
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: WA API fix (PATCH-063) now returns relative media_url for OUTGOING media (e.g. /media/org-uuid/file.webp). CRM proxy threw 400 Invalid URL because new URL() fails on relative paths. Fix: (A) Both proxy and publicProxy resolve relative paths by prefixing with wa_api_base_url origin before SSRF check and fetch (B) sync.service.ts now backfills media_url on existing messages when WA API provides one that was previously null

objective: Fix broadcast media send failing - media_type case mismatch
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: WA API expects lowercase media_type enum (image/video/audio/document) but CRM stores and sends UPPERCASE (IMAGE/VIDEO/AUDIO/DOCUMENT). All 5 recipients failed with VALIDATION_ERROR. Fix: sendMedia() now lowercases mediaType before sending to WA API. Single point of fix covers both broadcast and chat media sends

verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: GET /api/media/wa-proxy public tanpa auth — pakai findFirst() ambil API key org pertama. Fix: (A) Route wa-proxy sekarang pakai authenticate+tenantGuard dengan JWT token via ?token= query param (reuse logic dari /proxy route). (B) Frontend getMediaUrl() tambah &token= dari localStorage accessToken. publicProxy() method dibiarkan di controller (dead code — clean di patch terpisah). No regression — flow sama hanya tambah auth layer.

objective: HIGH F4 — Add organizationId to updateLastMessage()
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: updateLastMessage() hanya terima conversationId tanpa organization_id — defense-in-depth gap. Fix: tambah param organizationId + filter where {id AND organization_id}. 3 caller di message.service.ts updated (sendText sendMedia saveIncomingMessage). No regression — semua caller sudah punya orgId available.

objective: HIGH F5 — AGENT role guard on conversation operations
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: AGENT bisa akses semua conversation di orgnya via getById/getMessages/sendMessage/resolve/reopen/markAsRead — filter assigned_to hanya di list(). Fix: tambah _verifyAgentAccess() private method — cek role=AGENT AND assigned_to_user_id=userId. Dipanggil di 6 method. OWNER/ADMIN/SUPERVISOR tidak terpengaruh. No regression — list() tetap pakai filter existing.

objective: MEDIUM F6 — Add role restriction to analytics routes
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: analytics routes tidak ada authorize() — AGENT bisa lihat semua org analytics (revenue agent performance dll). Fix: tambah authorize('OWNER' 'ADMIN' 'SUPERVISOR') ke 4 analytics route. Frontend sidebar sudah hide menu untuk AGENT. No regression — OWNER/ADMIN/SUPERVISOR flow tidak berubah.

objective: MEDIUM F7 — Add organization_id scoping to updateStatus()
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: updateStatus() cari message global by wa_message_id tanpa org filter. Fix: (A) handleMessageStatus() resolve org dari instance_id via wAInstance lookup. (B) updateStatus() terima optional organizationId param — jika tersedia tambah ke where clause. Backward compatible — param optional. No regression — caller punya instance_id available.

objective: MEDIUM F8 — Fix handleInstanceStatus findFirst to findMany
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: handleInstanceStatus() pakai findFirst — jika wa_instance_id terdaftar di >1 org hanya org pertama yang di-update. Fix: ubah ke findMany + loop (konsisten dgn handleIncomingMessage pattern). Socket.IO emit per-org. No regression — single-org case tetap works identik.

objective: MEDIUM F9 — Add tenantGuard to auth routes
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: change-password dan profile routes pakai authenticate tapi tidak tenantGuard — user dari org yang di-deactivasi masih bisa akses. Fix: tambah tenantGuard middleware ke kedua route. No regression — user dari org aktif tidak terpengaruh.

objective: Add tag-based recipient selection to broadcast
verification_note: tsc clean (BE+FE) - Root cause: broadcast form hanya support pilih kontak manual (recipient_contact_ids) sementara scheduled-messages sudah punya tag selection (recipient_tag_ids). Fix: (A) validator tambah recipient_tag_ids optional + recipient_contact_ids jadi optional. (B) service resolve tag->contacts via contact_tags join lalu merge dgn manual contacts + validasi min 1 penerima. (C) frontend tambah tag query + formTagIds state + tag button UI + kirim recipient_tag_ids di payload + update disabled condition agar bisa submit dgn tag saja. Pattern identik dgn scheduled-messages. No schema migration needed - broadcast resolve recipients at create time. No regression - existing manual-only flow tetap works.

objective: AGENT role can only see assigned contacts
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: contact.service.list() dan getById() hanya filter by organizationId tanpa mempertimbangkan role AGENT. Conversation controller sudah benar (force assigned_to=userId untuk AGENT). Fix: tambah optional assignedToUserId param di list() dan getById(). Jika AGENT maka filter contacts via conversations.some.assigned_to_user_id. Controller pass userId jika role=AGENT. Backward compatible (param optional). No regression - OWNER/ADMIN/SUPERVISOR unaffected (param undefined=no filter).

objective: Add agent filter dropdown in chat for OWNER/ADMIN/SUPERVISOR
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: chat page hanya punya filter Semua/Chat Saya/Belum Ditugaskan tanpa bisa filter by specific agent. Backend sudah support assigned_to=userId. Fix: frontend-only - tambah Select dropdown 'Filter by Agent' yang fetch teamUsers (reuse existing query). agentFilter state + kirim assigned_to ke API. Hanya tampil untuk non-AGENT. No backend change needed. No regression - existing filter tabs tetap works.

objective: Add label filter for AGENT in chat page
verification_note: tsc clean (BE+FE) - Root cause: AGENT tidak punya cara filter conversations by label di chat page. Fix: (A) Backend tambah optional label query param di conversation.service.list() -> labels.some.label filter. (B) Controller pass req.query.label ke service. (C) Frontend tambah labelFilter state + Tag icon + Select dropdown yang extract unique labels dari conversations response. Hanya tampil untuk AGENT. Data isolation tetap aman karena backend force assigned_to=userId untuk AGENT (patch 077). No regression - non-AGENT roles unaffected.

objective: Extend label filter to all roles in chat page
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: patch 079 label filter hanya tampil untuk AGENT (isAgent guard). OWNER/ADMIN/SUPERVISOR juga perlu bisa filter by label. Fix: hapus isAgent condition pada label filter block sehingga tampil untuk semua role. Backend sudah support (patch 079). No regression - AGENT tetap works + role lain sekarang juga bisa filter.

objective: Fix label filter not showing for AGENT - fetch labels from dedicated endpoint
verification_note: tsc clean BE+FE - Root cause: label filter derived from conversations.flatMap(c.labels) so when AGENT conversations have no labels the filter is invisible. Fix: add GET /conversations/labels endpoint returning distinct labels (AGENT-scoped). Frontend fetches labels from endpoint instead of deriving from conversation list. Filter now always visible when org has labels.

objective: Fix label filter to use contact tags instead of empty conversation_labels table
verification_note: tsc clean BE+FE - Root cause: patch 081 queried conversation_labels table which is empty (no mechanism to populate it). User expects to filter by contact tags (managed in Kontak page). Fix: (1) listLabels() now queries tags table with AGENT scoping via contact->conversation join. (2) list() label filter now uses contact.contact_tags.some.tag.name instead of labels.some.label. Frontend unchanged - response shape same {label+color}. No regression.

objective: Fix AGENT not seeing label filter - remove AGENT scoping from listLabels
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: patch 082 listLabels() for AGENT filtered tags via contact->conversation join. AGENT Nuha's contact (6287882342097) has no tags assigned so query returned empty -> filter invisible. Fix: listLabels() now returns ALL org tags for all roles. Data isolation maintained: list() still forces assigned_to=userId for AGENT so selecting a tag only filters within AGENT own conversations. No regression confirmed.

objective: Add slash command / template quick reply in chat
verification_note: tsc clean FE - New feature: typing / in chat input shows floating popup with active templates. Filter by name or category. Arrow keys navigate + Enter selects + Esc closes. Template content fills textarea. Uses same absolute positioning pattern as emoji picker. No regression - existing send flow unchanged. UX: non-disruptive (only activates on / prefix).

objective: Add template auto-fill selector in broadcast create form
verification_note: tsc clean FE - New feature: optional template dropdown in broadcast create dialog. Selecting template auto-fills message content + passes template_id to backend (already supported). User can still edit message after template fill. No regression - form works with or without template.

objective: Add template auto-fill selector in scheduled-messages create form
verification_note: tsc clean FE - New feature: optional template dropdown in scheduled message create/edit dialog. Selecting template auto-fills message content. ScheduledMessage model has no template_id so only content auto-fill (no FK). No regression.

objective: Auto-substitute template variables in chat slash command
verification_note: tsc clean FE - selectSlashTemplate now replaces {{name}}/{{nama}} with contact.name and {{phone}} with contact.phone_number from selectedConv. Case-insensitive regex. If no contact data available gracefully leaves empty string. No regression.

objective: Increment template usage_count when used in chat or broadcast
verification_note: tsc clean BE+FE - (1) Added incrementUsage method to template service. (2) Added POST /:id/use endpoint (any authenticated user). (3) broadcast.service.create increments when template_id provided. (4) Chat slash command calls POST /templates/:id/use fire-and-forget. Template card now shows accurate usage count. No regression.

objective: Add AutoResponse model to Prisma schema
verification_note: tsc clean + prisma generate OK + db push confirmed (auto_responses table created). Model: AutoResponse with trigger enum (NEW_CHAT/OUTSIDE_HOURS) + template_id FK + business hours config + cooldown_minutes + timezone. Unique constraint on (org_id+trigger). Relations added to Organization and MessageTemplate. No regression.

objective: Add AutoResponse CRUD backend - service + controller + routes
verification_note: tsc clean BE - (1) auto-response.service: list + upsert + delete with org scoping and template validation. (2) controller: zod validated. (3) routes: GET / (all roles) + PUT / (OWNER/ADMIN) + DELETE /:trigger (OWNER/ADMIN). Registered at /auto-responses. No regression.

objective: Add auto-response engine + webhook integration + fix _verifyAgentAccess
verification_note: tsc clean BE - (1) auto-response-engine: evaluates NEW_CHAT and OUTSIDE_HOURS triggers with cooldown and timezone-aware business hours and template variable substitution. Sends via WA API + saves message in DB. (2) webhook.service calls engine fire-and-forget for INCOMING messages. (3) Fix: conversation.controller _verifyAgentAccess extracted from class method to standalone function (this binding loss in Express route handlers). No regression.

objective: Add auto-response settings UI in Settings page
verification_note: tsc clean FE - New tab Auto-Response in Settings page with 2 cards: (1) NEW_CHAT greeting config with template selector + cooldown. (2) OUTSIDE_HOURS with template + business hours (time inputs) + business days (day toggles) + cooldown. Each card shows active/toggle/delete if rule exists. Upsert + delete via /auto-responses API. No regression.

objective: Upgrade chat input to WhatsApp-like auto-growing textarea
verification_note: tsc clean FE - Root cause: chat input used single-line Input element which cannot display multi-line text or grow. Fix: replace Input with textarea + auto-resize effect (1 row to ~6 rows max then scroll). Enter=send Shift+Enter=newline. Formatting shortcuts Ctrl+B bold Ctrl+I italic. Emoji+Send buttons aligned to bottom-end. All existing features (slash command + emoji picker + attachment) preserved. No regression.

objective: Add WhatsApp-style floating format toolbar on text selection in chat
verification_note: tsc clean FE - Root cause: no format toolbar on text selection. Fix: detect selection via onSelect+onMouseUp events. When text selected show floating dark toolbar above textarea with 7 buttons: Bold Italic Strikethrough Code OrderedList UnorderedList Quote. Click wraps selected text with WA format markers. onMouseDown preventDefault keeps focus. Outside click dismisses. Existing features (slash command + emoji + Ctrl shortcuts) preserved. No regression.

objective: Add WYSIWYG rich-text preview in chat input using transparent textarea + formatted backdrop
verification_note: tsc clean FE - Root cause: textarea shows raw WA markup (*bold*) not actual formatted text. Fix: overlay technique - textarea text made transparent (caret still visible via caretColor). Behind it a backdrop div renders formatWAText() output showing real bold/italic/strikethrough/monospace. Container div holds bg-muted/50. Placeholder rendered in backdrop. Scroll synced. Emoji button z-index raised. Reuses existing formatWAText from lib. No regression - all features preserved.

objective: Change unordered list bullet from dash to dot character
verification_note: tsc clean FE - Cosmetic change: unordered list format button now inserts bullet dot () instead of dash (-). No regression.

objective: Add deleteMessage to WAApiClient and DELETED status to MessageStatus enum
verification_note: tsc clean BE - Added POST /messages/delete method to WAApiClient with instance_id + message_id + chat_jid + optional from_me/participant/delete_for params. Added DELETED to MessageStatus enum. No regression - additive only.

objective: backend
files_changed: Delete message endpoint - service + controller + route (DELETE /:id/messages/:messageId)

objective: frontend
files_changed: Delete message UI - hover dropdown on bubbles + DELETED status display

objective: backend
files_changed: Schema add is_edited+edited_at to Message + WAApiClient editMessage() method
verification_note: tsc clean - Added is_edited Boolean + edited_at DateTime? fields. Added editMessage(instanceId+messageId+chatJid+newText) to WAApiClient.

objective: backend
verification_note: tsc clean - editMessage(): validates OUTGOING+not DELETED+not AUDIO/STICKER+15min window. Calls WA API. Updates content/caption+is_edited+edited_at in DB. Route: PUT /:id/messages/:messageId.

objective: frontend
files_changed: Edit message UI - inline edit mode + diedit label + 15min guard
verification_note: tsc clean - Added Pencil icon + editingMessageId/editText state + editMutation (PUT). Outgoing dropdown now shows Edit (if within 15min + not audio/sticker). Inline textarea with Enter=save Esc=cancel. Shows diedit label on edited messages. No regression on delete feature.
